title: Oil, Shipping, Flights: Disruptions Are Back as U.S.-Iran War Reignites
summary_full: Higher prices for energy, food and air travel are likely to persist as the two sides escalate their clash over the Strait of Hormuz and launch airstrikes in the Middle East.
summary_public: Higher prices for energy, food and air travel are likely to persist as the two sides escalate their clash over the Strait of Hormuz and launch airstrikes in the Middle East.
